title: Tech stock sell-off accelerates; SoftBank drops 6% as investors sour on AI-linked names
summary: Global tech stocks tracked overnight losses as U.S. markets led by a sell-off in Broadcom, with SoftBank dropping 6%. The decline reflects growing investor concerns about overvaluation in AI-linked companies. The broader sell-off signals potential market skepticism about the sustainability of recent AI-driven gains.
content: Global tech stocks tracked overnight losses in U.S. tech names led by a sell-off in Broadcom.

zh.title: 科技股抛售加速；软银下跌6%，投资者看衰AI概念股
zh.summary: 全球科技股追随隔夜跌势，美国市场由博通抛售领跌，软银下跌6%。这一下跌反映出投资者对AI概念股估值过高的日益担忧。更广泛的抛售表明市场对最近由AI推动的涨幅可持续性存在潜在怀疑。

title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
summary: Despite the Kospi emerging as one of the world's standout performers this year, foreign investors have sold billions of dollars in Korean stocks. The selling intensified Monday when the benchmark Kospi plunged over 8% at the open. The divergence between strong performance and foreign investor exits suggests concerns about valuations or longer-term economic outlook.
content: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.

zh.title: 尽管股市创纪录上涨，外资今年仍抛售数十亿美元韩国股票。原因何在
zh.summary: 尽管KOSPI指数成为今年全球表现最突出的指数之一，外资今年已出售数十亿美元的韩国股票。周一KOSPI指数开盘下跌超过8%，抛售加剧。强劲表现与外资撤出之间的矛盾反映出市场对估值或长期经济前景的担忧。

title: Nvidia strikes a new memory-chip deal as SK Hynix and Samsung shares close with big losses
summary: Nvidia announced a new memory-chip deal as major semiconductor manufacturers SK Hynix and Samsung saw shares decline sharply. South Korea's Kospi index continued falling as enthusiasm for the AI trade cooled. The development reflects shifting dynamics in the chip industry amid market uncertainty.
content: South Korea’s once-hot Kospi index is headed for another day of sharp declines as the AI trade loses steam.

zh.title: 英伟达达成新的存储芯片交易，SK海力士和三星股价大幅下跌
zh.summary: 英伟达宣布达成新的存储芯片交易，主要半导体制造商SK海力士和三星股价大幅下跌。随着AI交易热情冷却，韩国KOSPI指数继续下跌。这一发展反映了芯片行业在市场不确定性中的动态变化。

title: Earthquake of magnitude 7.8 strikes off southern Philippines, tsunami warnings issued
summary: A magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck off Mindanao in the southern Philippines on Monday, triggering tsunami warnings for coastal areas. The significant seismic event posed potential danger to local populations. Authorities issued alerts to protect residents from potential tsunami waves.
content: Tsunami warnings were issued after an earthquake of magnitude 7.8 struck off Mindanao in the southern Philippines on Monday.

zh.title: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，发布海啸警报
zh.summary: 周一，菲律宾南部棉兰老岛附近发生了7.8级地震，引发了沿海地区的海啸警报。这次重大地震事件对当地居民构成了潜在危险。当局发布了警报，以保护居民免受潜在海浪的威胁。

title: Oil prices edge higher after strikes on Israel test ceasefire
summary: Iran launched attacks its first since April ceasefire, threatening further escalation in the Middle East. Oil prices rose in response to renewed regional tensions and the threat of prolonged conflict.
content: Iran said the attacks, its first since an April ceasefire, are the start of "a full week" of strikes

zh.title: 以色列遭袭后油价略涨，停火协议受考验
zh.summary: 伊朗自4月停火以来首次发动袭击，威胁中东局势进一步升级。油价上涨反映了地区紧张局势加剧和长期冲突风险。

title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
summary: Hong Kong's IPO market faces growing challenges as companies see stock prices decline after listing despite strong pre-debut performance. This threatens Hong Kong's efforts to compete with Wall Street as a top IPO destination.
content: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.

zh.title: 香港首次公开募股繁荣面临股价表现问题
zh.summary: 尽管上市前表现强劲，香港IPO市场面临日益增长的挑战，因为公司上市后股价下跌。这威胁到香港与华尔街竞争顶级IPO目的地的努力。

title: Oil prices rise after Iran fires missiles at Israel, escalating regional tensions
summary: Oil prices surged Monday as Iran's missile strikes on Israel escalated Middle East tensions. The heightened conflict raises concerns about prolonged regional instability and energy market disruption.
content: Oil rises on Monday amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, raising concerns that the conflict may drag on.

zh.title: 伊朗向以色列发射导弹后油价上升，地区紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 周一伊朗对以色列的导弹袭击导致油价飙升，升级了中东紧张局势。冲突加剧引发了对长期地区不稳定和能源市场中断的担忧。

title: U.S. stock futures fall as Iran attacks Israel; South Korea's Kospi plunges 8%: Live updates
summary: Iran's attacks on Israel triggered sharp declines in U.S. stock futures and an 8% plunge in South Korea's Kospi index. Markets are also awaiting key inflation data and SpaceX's public debut.
content: Investors will also be focused on inflation data and the public debut of SpaceX on Friday.

zh.title: 伊朗攻击以色列，美股期货下跌；韩国KOSPI指数暴跌8%：实时更新
zh.summary: 伊朗对以色列的攻击引发美国股市期货大幅下滑，韩国KOSPI指数暴跌8%。市场还在等待关键的通胀数据和SpaceX的上市。

title: U.S. stock futures mixed, oil prices surge as new attacks threaten the cease-fire with Iran
summary: U.S. stock futures recovered from initial losses as new Iran tensions threatened the fragile ceasefire, with oil prices surging. Markets remained volatile following Friday's tech-driven selloff.
content: U.S. stock-index futures largely erased initial losses Sunday, after a massive tech selloff on Friday interrupted Wall Street’s two-month rally, and after new developments threatened the fragile cease-fire in the Iran war.

zh.title: 美股期货涨跌不一，油价飙升，新攻击威胁伊朗停火
zh.summary: 随着新的伊朗局势紧张威胁脆弱的停火，美国股市期货从初期损失中恢复，油价飙升。在周五科技股抛售后，市场保持波动。

title: Why AI hyperscalers are now the epicenter of a bear case for stocks
summary: AI hyperscalers have become the focus of bearish investor arguments as capital demands grow faster than returns. The bear case centers on insufficient near-term demand to justify massive ongoing investments. Concerns about AI profitability and sustainability are now influencing broader market sentiment.
content: In the near term, there are many mouths to feed and not enough to eat.

zh.title: 为什么AI超大规模计算企业现在成为股票看空论的中心
zh.summary: 随着资本需求增长快于回报，AI超大规模计算企业成为了看空投资者论点的焦点。看空论点的核心是近期需求不足以证明大规模持续投资的合理性。关于AI盈利能力和可持续性的担忧现在正影响更广泛的市场情绪。
